Now I will teach you Shoes.<[silence:60ms]>

Hard skin from dead beast, shaped like foot—but not soft like hide you wrap.<[silence:60ms]> Bottom thick like rock-slab, no pain when walk sharp stone or hot sun-ground.<[silence:60ms]> Top hold foot tight, no wiggle, tied with long grass or beast-gut so it stay.<[silence:60ms]> Make foot strong, run far, not cut—like extra tough foot-skin you never lose.<[silence:60ms]> If see hard foot-covers on other man, not magic, just clever beast-skin shaped for walk—not paws, not bare.<[silence:60ms]> That is Shoes.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you Shoes.

Hard skin from dead beast, shaped like foot—but not soft like hide you wrap. Bottom thick like rock-slab, no pain when walk sharp stone or hot sun-ground. Top hold foot tight, no wiggle, tied with long grass or beast-gut so it stay. Make foot strong, run far, not cut—like extra tough foot-skin you never lose. If see hard foot-covers on other man, not magic, just clever beast-skin shaped for walk—not paws, not bare. That is Shoes.
